title: Update node-sass to version 3.10.1 🚀
body:
Hello lovely humans, [node-sass](https://www.npmjs.com/package/node-sass) just published its new version 3.10.1.
State Update :rocket:
Dependency node-sass
New version 3.10.1
Type devDependency
This version is **not covered** by your **current version range**. Without accepting this pull request your project will work just like it did before. There might be a bunch of new features, fixes and perf improvements that the maintainers worked on for you though. I recommend you look into these changes and try to get onto the latest version of node-sass. Given that you have a decent test suite, a passing build is a strong indicator that you can take advantage of these changes by merging the proposed change into your project. Otherwise this branch is a great starting point for you to work on the update. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- [GitHub Release](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/releases/tag/v3.10.1)

Fixes

This release address a couple minor bugs affecting the node-sass integration into the node-citgm.

  • Make the missing binding error message test more fault tolerant (@xzyfer)
  • Publish test to npm

Supported Environments

OS Architecture Node
Windows x86 & x64 0.10, 0.12, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6
OSX x64 0.10, 0.12, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6
Linux x86 & x64 0.10, 0.12, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6
FreeBSD i386 & amd64 0.10, 0.12, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6

*Linux support refers to Ubuntu, Debian, and CentOS 5

--- The new version differs by 19 commits . - [`7e27148`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/7e27148d834dc2b092f4882895a0b18e70c4bbea) 3.10.1 - [`138d35d`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/138d35d9e05e81064a5cc4b0e8b0d22ad7832e0e) Update changelog - [`ea1ccb8`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/ea1ccb86aaf639eda01a810fd70ef8989c33163a) Don't test Node 5 in CI - [`cf9f806`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/cf9f8068c8ec09a9205cb5cb7d837bcfbb2254cd) Publish test to npm - [`a974a6a`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/a974a6a791c11ec32392da2098d683ee9216df0d) Make the missing binding error message test more fault tolerant - [`aec7049`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/aec7049bef2e5262083784b3fc5b6f7d97fb005c) Update changelog - [`24e2e2c`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/24e2e2c7b79b743e5f4a829c7dacfe372d635c8f) 3.10.0 - [`128646e`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/128646e651402182c5e5e8b0612bcdc3de6cf99f) Merge pull request #1717 from nschonni/issue-template-update - [`eb8df02`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/eb8df022c182db2f45e2ba31638ecfa452afa631) Update ISSUE_TEMPLATE with Bootstrap format - [`105cca2`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/105cca21924beb111ca1866d82bc7bef8e79b2f9) Merge pull request #1711 from nschonni/util-extent-to-object-assign - [`ccfbbcb`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/ccfbbcb0ee5aa4ebf20e883caa58543d8611cebb) Merge pull request #1698 from nschonni/update-spec-runner - [`b27386d`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/b27386dfcdae4690de9ed1660fac8c0e54ef924a) Switch sass-spec submodule for NPM - [`0c709c1`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/0c709c1e5fb0a6ef20412f6dc353d0cb59ba1605) Merge pull request #1700 from nschonni/eslint-updates - [`61f42de`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/61f42dee63a8175cf2ccaa35e41ee243b3875074) Replace util._extend with lodash.assign - [`6dda1de`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/6dda1dedd82c983b1b08a05ec93f1e4f48034b6d) Merge pull request #1703 from sass/revert-1688-feat/publish-tests There are 19 commits in total. See the [full diff](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/compare/72af63e7faee466720cffc8e61e386bcbdfa4cb5...7e27148d834dc2b092f4882895a0b18e70c4bbea). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/). Tired of seeing this sponsor message? :zap: `greenkeeper upgrade`
